owner_contact.description: The owner contact information for the API

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource

event_config.description: The event configuration for the API

name.description: A user-supplied name for the GraphQL API

authentication_type.description: The authentication type: API_KEY, AWS_IAM, AMAZON_COGNITO_USER_POOLS, OPENID_CONNECT, AWS_LAMBDA

user_pool_config.description: The Amazon Cognito user pool configuration

additional_authentication_providers.description: A list of additional authentication providers

xray_enabled.description: A flag indicating whether to enable X-Ray tracing

lambda_authorizer_config.description: Configuration for AWS Lambda function authorization

visibility.description: Sets the value of the GraphQL API to public (GLOBAL) or private (PRIVATE)

api_type.description: The value that indicates whether the GraphQL API is a standard API (GRAPHQL) or merged API (MERGED)

merged_api_execution_role_arn.description: The Identity and Access Management service role ARN for a merged API

owner_contact.description: The owner contact information for an API resource

introspection_config.description: Sets the value of the GraphQL API to enable (ENABLED) or disable (DISABLED) introspection

query_depth_limit.description: The maximum depth a query can have in a single request

resolver_count_limit.description: The maximum number of resolvers that can be invoked in a single request

toolSpec.name: create_api_key
toolSpec.description: Creates a unique key that you can distribute to clients who invoke your API.

api_id.description: The ID for the GraphQL API

description.description: A description of the purpose of the API key

expires.description: From the creation time, the time after which the API key expires (Unix timestamp)

toolSpec.name: create_api_cache
toolSpec.description: Creates a cache for the GraphQL API.

ttl.description: TTL in seconds for entries in the API cache. Valid values are 1-3600 seconds

api_caching_behavior.description: Caching behavior. Valid values: FULL_REQUEST_CACHING, PER_RESOLVER_CACHING

type.description: The cache instance type. Valid values: SMALL, MEDIUM, LARGE, XLARGE, LARGE_2X, LARGE_4X, LARGE_8X, LARGE_12X

transit_encryption_enabled.description: Transit encryption flag when connecting to cache

health_metrics_config.description: The health metrics configuration. Valid values: ENABLED, DISABLED

toolSpec.name: create_datasource
toolSpec.description: Creates a DataSource object for a GraphQL API.

api_id.description: The API ID for the GraphQL API for the DataSource

name.description: A user-supplied name for the DataSource

type.description: The type of the DataSource. Valid values: AWS_LAMBDA, AMAZON_DYNAMODB, AMAZON_ELASTICSEARCH, HTTP, NONE, RELATIONAL_DATABASE, AMAZON_EVENTBRIDGE, AMAZON_OPENSEARCH_SERVICE

service_role_arn.description: The AWS IAM service role ARN for the data source. Format: arn:aws:iam::ACCOUNT-ID:role/ROLE-NAME

metrics_config.description: Enables or disables enhanced DataSource metrics. Valid values: ENABLED, DISABLED

toolSpec.name: create_function
toolSpec.description: Creates a Function object for a GraphQL API.

function_version.description: The version of the request mapping template. Currently, the supported value is 2018-05-29

sync_config.description: Describes a Sync configuration for a resolver

max_batch_size.description: The maximum batching size for a resolver

runtime.description: Describes a runtime used by an AWS AppSync pipeline resolver or AWS AppSync function

code.description: The function code that contains the request and response functions

toolSpec.name: create_channel_namespace
toolSpec.description: Creates a ChannelNamespace for an Api.

api_id.description: The ID of the Api associated with the ChannelNamespace

subscribe_auth_modes.description: The authorization mode to use for subscribing to messages on the channel namespace

publish_auth_modes.description: The authorization mode to use for publishing messages on the channel namespace

code_handlers.description: The event handler functions that run custom business logic to process published events and subscribe requests

handler_configs.description: Configuration for event handlers that process published events and subscribe requests

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource

toolSpec.name: create_domain_name
toolSpec.description: Creates a custom domain name for use with AppSync APIs.

domain_name.description: The domain name to create (e.g., api.example.com)

certificate_arn.description: The ARN of the certificate from AWS Certificate Manager

description.description: A description of the domain name

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource

toolSpec.name: create_resolver
toolSpec.description: Creates a resolver for a GraphQL field in an AppSync API.

api_id.description: The API ID for the GraphQL API

type_name.description: The name of the type (e.g., Query, Mutation, Subscription)

field_name.description: The name of the field to attach the resolver to

data_source_name.description: The name of the data source (required for unit resolvers)

request_mapping_template.description: The request mapping template in VTL (Velocity Template Language)

response_mapping_template.description: The response mapping template in VTL (Velocity Template Language)

kind.description: The resolver kind: UNIT or PIPELINE

pipeline_config.description: Pipeline configuration for PIPELINE resolvers with functions list

max_batch_size.description: Maximum batch size for batch operations

code.description: The resolver code for JavaScript/TypeScript resolvers

toolSpec.name: create_schema
toolSpec.description: Creates a GraphQL schema for an AppSync API and polls until completion.

api_id.description: The API ID for the GraphQL API

definition.description: The schema definition in GraphQL Schema Definition Language (SDL)
